news.title: Gold rises 1% as hopes for US-Iran diplomacy pause oil rally
news.description: Gold prices gained over 1% as investors tracked diplomatic efforts to ease the US-Iran conflict and assessed the impact on inflation and the Federal Reserve’s rate outlook. news.title: Bought this Sovereign Gold Bond in 2021? Your Rs 1 lakh investment is now worth nearly Rs 2.98 lakh
news.description: The Reserve Bank of India has set the premature redemption price for SGB 2021-22 Series-IV. Investors can redeem these bonds prematurely from July 20, 2026, after five years. Tax rules apply to capital gains on premature redemption of these bonds.
